title: Retrieval-Guided Planning for Robust Multi-Hop Reasoning
desc: A framework that empowers agents to dynamically refine their search trajectory based on intermediate retrieval results, ensuring every reasoning step is strictly grounded in available evidence.

title: AIPQA: Benchmarking Multimodal Retrieval on Technical Aviation Documents
desc: Introduces AIPQA, a multimodal question-answering benchmark grounded in the Singapore Aeronautical Information Publication (SG-AIP).

title: Safety-Oriented Evaluation of Language Understanding Systems for Air Traffic Control
desc: Studies the problem of evaluating language understanding systems in safety-critical ATC environments and proposes a risk-aware, consequence-oriented evaluation framework.

title: VMLU: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Vietnamese Language Model Understanding
desc: A definitive benchmark evaluating reasoning, planning, and safety in Vietnamese LLMs — establishing a critical standard for model evaluation. Evaluates Llama-3, Qwen2.5, GPT-4 and more.

title: KiLM — Vision Language Model
desc: Vision language models for image captioning, OCR, and visual question answering powering Zalo's image retrieval features. Achieved 43.8 on MTVQA — highest at time of release.

title: KiLM
desc: One of the first Vietnamese LLMs pre-trained from scratch on nearly 2TB of clean Vietnamese text. Achieved SOTA on TencentLMEval and VMLU, surpassing GPT-4 with 66.07 on VMLU.

title: VinaLLaMA
desc: First instruction-tuned LLaMA-based models for Vietnamese, achieving thousands of monthly downloads and fostering the local open-source AI community.

title: Vietcuna
desc: First instruction-tuned BLOOMZ-based model for Vietnamese, achieving thousands of monthly downloads and fostering the local open-source AI community.

title: ViDeBERTa: A powerful pre-trained language model for Vietnamese
desc: A pre-trained monolingual encoder for Vietnamese trained on a large-scale, high-quality corpus, significantly outperforming previous BERT-based models on downstream NLU tasks.

title: A study of R-Drop in BARTpho for Vietnamese Abstractive Text Summarization
desc: Enhanced BARTpho performance for Vietnamese text summarization using R-Drop regularization.
